title: Interlinked Changes To Eunisell Interlinked Plc
description: The management of Interlinked Technologies Pls have officially notified the exchange and the investing public that its name had changed from; Interlinked Technologies Plc to Eunisell Interlinked Plc N
html:
The management of Interlinked Technologies Pls have officially notified the exchange and the investing public that its name had changed from; Interlinked Technologies Plc to Eunisell Interlinked Plc

Noting that the said change has been implemented by the Nigerian Exchange Limited during the week ended 25th June, 2021. This is in line with the approval obtained from the Company’s shareholders at its Annual General Meeting held on 10 December 2020 and the Company’s receipt of a new certificate of incorporation from the Corporate Affairs Commission. In line with this, the Company’s trading symbol has also changed from INTERLINK to EUNISELL.

Eunisell Interlinked Plc was incorporated in 1981 as Raychem Nigeria Limited. To achieve the business expansion goals, Eunisell listed on the Nigeria Stock Exchange in 1993. It has since diversified into component design and manufacture, systems design and upgrades, procurement and installation of complete power distribution substations. The company additionally serves as a major distributor and representative for various multinational corporations.

Eunisell Interlinked Plc has been positioned to be the foremost distributor of a wide range of engineering and technical products including cable accessories and machine spare parts, servicing and supplying the best products to a wide range of industries/companies.

The company has its Head Office in Lagos and maintains a liaison office in Abuja to engender superior service delivery. The company also maintains outposts in Port Harcourt and Warri.
